title: Four Small Snails
cover_prompt: a diagonal line of four tiny golden dots on deep blue, each dot dimmer than the last, like fading lanterns in a dark garden
lyrics:
[verse]
One bright bee hums in the clover
Softly curled where petals cover

[verse]
One bright bee hums in the clover
Two green frogs on a lily hover

[verse]
One bright bee hums in the clover
Two green frogs on a lily hover
Three white moths drift through the air

[verse]
One bright bee hums in the clover
Two green frogs on a lily hover
Three white moths drift through the air
Four small snails on the path creep there
And that was all
style_prompt: Children's counting lullaby, clear sweet female vocal, xylophone and music box, 66 BPM, simple repetitive melody, same tune every line, cumulative nursery rhyme structure, bright but soft, childlike, extremely predictable rhythm, music box accompaniment
